_ModelPath_example: Point at your GGUF — or set OVERFIT_MODEL_DIR. README.md explains both paths. Q8_0 is far more reliable than Q4_K_M for constrained tool-calling / JSON.
_EmbeddingModelPath_example: MiniLM directory (config.json + vocab.txt + model.safetensors) for RAG — or set OVERFIT_EMBEDDING_DIR. Only needed for /documents/index + /rag/query.
